# yPosition: ----
# approachID: 2023.03.23-09.17.55-00046
# force-settings.type: segmented-force-settings

# force-settings.global-settings.closed-loop: true
# force-settings.global-settings.start-option.type: continue

# force-settings.global-settings.pixel-clock.name:

# force-settings.global-settings.pause-before-first.identifier.type: standard
